task_description: Build Si-Admin - a comprehensive admin dashboard application for managing business operations including chat management, follow-up system, customer feedback, stock/inventory management, business type customization, and multi-channel support. Built with Next.js 14+, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, and Prisma with SQLite.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds with all 19 routes (5 static pages + 14 dynamic API routes). Prisma db push and seed run successfully. No unit tests (greenfield prototype). Docker not used. Review issues addressed: transactional stock movements, PATCH field whitelisting, channel cascade check, queryRaw fix, input validation.
